name: Mom's City Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the egg and milk together and set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 300-325°F.
3. Prepare the meat as if it were a shish-kabob; alternate the meats and place on a skewer.
4. Dredge the meat in the egg/milk mixture, then the flour, and put into a non-stick baking dish.
5. Sprinkle the spices on top. (You might want to coat the dish with a non-stick spray first.)
6. Bake at 300-325 degrees for about 2 1/2 - 3 hours, or until the meat is browned on all sides and very tender. If desired, serve this with gravy. It is very filling and very good.
